name: Black Bottom Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cornstarch and 1/2 cup sugar in a bowl.
2. Slowly stir the milk into the egg yolks.
3. Stir this mixture into the cornstarch and sugar mixture.
4. Cook over a double boiler, stirring constantly, until it coats the spoon.
5. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
6. Remove one cup of the custard mixture and stir in chocolate bits until melted.
7. Pour the chocolate mixture into the pastry shell and chill.
8. Soften gelatin in water and add to the remaining hot custard; stir until dissolved.
9. Add additional flavoring as desired.
10. Chill until slightly thickened.
11. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
12. Gradually add the remaining sugar while beating until stiff.
13. Fold the custard and gelatin mixture into the beaten egg whites.
14. Pile over the chocolate layer in the pie shell.
15. Chill until set and garnish with chopped walnuts.
Mrs. Henry D. Chaplin
